summary: Iteration 53: Community Feed + AI Product Search API & UI Testing - All features working correctly. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: ProductSearchPage and CommunityPage UI verified.
passed_tests: ✅ Store names include: Praktiker, Technomarket, IKEA, Jysk, Bauhaus, HomeMax
✅ Search button disabled when no input
✅ Search button enabled when text entered
✅ Post filters section visible with 5 filter buttons
✅ Filter buttons: Всички, Обсъждане, Проекти, Въпроси, Преди/След
✅ New post form hidden when logged out
✅ New post form visible when logged in
✅ Post type buttons: text, project, question, before_after
✅ Post creation flow works - 'Публикувано!' toast shown
✅ Posts displayed with images in feed (14+ posts found)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test posts created via pytest and Playwright - prefixed with 'TEST_' or 'Test post from'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 verified: 1) Community feed endpoints fully working - create posts (text, images, project link), like, comment, delete. 2) AI Product Search endpoint working - accepts text query, rejects empty, returns store_count=21. 3) /api/scrape/stores returns exactly 21 Bulgarian stores. 4) Frontend pages /product-search and /community load correctly with all expected UI elements and data-testids. 5) Login flow: use /login with data-testid='login-email', 'login-password', 'login-submit'. 6) Community new post form has data-testids: new-post-form, post-text-input, add-image-btn, link-project-btn, submit-post-btn, post-type-*. Note: Store scraping may return 0 products in preview env due to DNS/SSL restrictions - this is expected.

scrape_stores_endpoint.details: GET /api/scrape/stores returns exactly 21 Bulgarian stores including Praktiker, Technomarket, IKEA, etc.

ai_search_endpoint.details: POST /api/scrape/ai-search accepts text query, rejects empty requests, returns stores_count=21

community_posts_crud.details: Create (text, images, project), Read (with filters), Delete own posts all working

community_interactions.details: Like toggle and comment creation working via API tests

community_validation.details: Empty posts rejected, empty comments rejected, auth required for POST/DELETE

product_search_ui.details: Upload zone, room select, text input, search button - all present with correct data-testids

community_ui.details: Filters, new post form (when logged in), posts display - all working
